declared.title: Kenya: Freedom on the Net 2023 Country Report
declared.selection_rationale: Confirmed live via direct fetch, 2026-07-20 (title and coverage period verified: "Key Developments, June 1, 2022 - May 31, 2023"). Coverage-contribution value: gives Kenya a second year in the corpus alongside the existing 2024 chapter, enabling real year-over-year comparison rather than a single snapshot -- directly useful for the assistant's own research-question angle on how conditions changed over time. Full content not yet read in detail beyond the coverage-period confirmation; specific findings to be logged at semantic review.
